abstract_classes.name: Tool
abstract_classes.note: Well-used abstraction, appropriate for the use case

abstract_classes.name: TierBasedGenerator
abstract_classes.note: Well-used abstraction, appropriate for the use case

interfaces_with_many_optionals.name: LoopOptions
interfaces_with_many_optionals.note: CRITICAL: God interface with excessive optional properties

interfaces_with_many_optionals.name: ProjectConfig
interfaces_with_many_optionals.note: High optional count - config object with nested optional structures

interfaces_with_many_optionals.name: LLMProviderConfig
interfaces_with_many_optionals.note: Contains deprecated properties contributing to bloat

interfaces_with_many_optionals.name: LLMConfig
interfaces_with_many_optionals.note: High optional count for provider-agnostic config

wrapper_classes.name: P5GeneratorV2
wrapper_classes.issue: Thin wrapper around TierBasedGenerator with minimal additional logic

wrapper_classes.name: ReadFileTool
wrapper_classes.issue: Tool pattern results in many small wrapper-like classes
wrapper_classes.note: Justified by the Tool abstraction pattern - enables polymorphism

over_abstractions.name: LoopOptions
over_abstractions.issue: Interface has 42 optional properties - violates Interface Segregation Principle. Contains flags for unrelated features: swarm, collab, archive learning, map elites, aesthetic model, etc.
over_abstractions.recommendation: Split into feature-specific interfaces: SwarmLoopOptions, CollabLoopOptions, EvolutionLoopOptions, etc. Use composition or intersection types.

over_abstractions.name: ProjectConfig
over_abstractions.issue: Config interface with excessive optional nested objects. Easy to accumulate technical debt as features are added.
over_abstractions.recommendation: Use a discriminated union or plugin-based config pattern. Each feature should register its config schema.

over_abstractions.name: LLMProviderConfig
over_abstractions.issue: Interface has 5 deprecated properties (marked with @deprecated) contributing to technical debt
over_abstractions.recommendation: Remove deprecated properties in next major version. Document migration path.

over_abstractions.name: P5GeneratorV2
over_abstractions.issue: Only adds ~15 lines of unique logic (validateOutput + promptSuggestsSound) beyond base class
over_abstractions.recommendation: Consider if validation logic could be moved to a strategy pattern or if subclass is truly needed

positive_abstractions.name: Tool
positive_abstractions.reason: Clean abstraction with 13 implementations, enables polymorphic tool execution in harness agent

positive_abstractions.name: TierBasedGenerator
positive_abstractions.reason: Centralizes model-tier adaptation logic across 9 generators, reduces duplication

positive_abstractions.name: LLMError hierarchy
positive_abstractions.reason: Standard error classification enabling retry logic and error handling strategies

recommendations.issue: LoopOptions interface is a 'god interface' with 42 optional properties
recommendations.action: Refactor into feature-specific interfaces and use composition
recommendations.benefit: Improved type safety, better IDE autocomplete, easier testing

recommendations.issue: ProjectConfig interface accumulates optional properties from all features
recommendations.benefit: Feature modules own their config, easier to maintain

recommendations.issue: Deprecated properties in LLMProviderConfig contribute to technical debt
recommendations.action: Schedule removal for v2.0, provide migration guide
recommendations.benefit: Cleaner API surface, less confusion for developers

recommendations.action: Evaluate if factory pattern or configuration-based approach would suffice
recommendations.benefit: Fewer files to maintain, less boilerplate

statistics.overall_assessment: Mostly healthy abstraction patterns with one critical issue (LoopOptions god interface)
